concerns: judge-guard.sh is already live in the global settings.json, blocking gh pr create in every repo before the skill/gate-stub/catalog wiring (Tasks 4-5) land
hook block message points at running-the-observability-judge, which does not exist on disk at this HEAD
round-1 hook bug (self-blocking substring false-positive) was caught reactively rather than anticipated by the initial test design
hooks/README.md does not document judge-guard.sh (pre-existing gap shared with doc-guard.sh)
judge-guard.sh is a global gate: every gh pr create in every repo on this machine is blocked without a fresh verdict or JUDGE_EXEMPT - confirm cross-repo/CI impact is acceptable
the rtk-wrapper-stripping code path is untested by the automated suite (verified by hand in this run, not by a committed test case)
the pre-fix dogfood verdict file (2026-07-16-observability-judge.md) still uses the old buggy naming scheme and was not renamed to match the corrected <date>-<branch_slug>.md schema
the chained-command gap (foo && gh pr create) is real and documented, not a hidden bypass, but remains a way past the gate
retrieval quality entirely deferred to implementation; golden-query set does not exist yet, so effectiveness is unproven at design stage
golden-query set is a narrow hand-picked proxy - a green suite can mask poor recall on out-of-set queries
LLM digests can hallucinate; provenance makes them auditable but not accurate, and digest quality is only spot-checked not systematically measured
SQLite-vs-Qdrant store decision is ADR-worthy but lives in a spec, not docs/decisions/
new uv/Python subsystem plus sqlite-vec dependency enter the global .claude config repo - confirm dependency approval explicitly at implementation
SessionStart hook fires every session - verify the one-line nudge stays silent/cheap and never auto-injects
rounds-config request lacks validators (dup round numbers / open>=lock / naive datetimes) — 500s not 422s on admin route
season_round_queens changes guarded only in service; TOCTOU at lock instant; > vs >= lock-boundary mismatch
open-round queen-set edits can silently un-enter existing brackets
downgrade destroys rounds>1 brackets (documented, by design)
deprecated Starlette 422 constant; seed idempotency skip-only
